honest_issues: pb.vision remains a reference comparator, not ground truth or promotion evidence.
The source video is now hash- and frame-verified, but this export-forensics lane did not run our pipeline head-to-head.
Literal all-bounces, universal hard-anchor, and 100%-ballistic hypotheses are false at scale; only narrower flag-aware forms survived.
One exported camera segment cannot rule out physical wobble or unexported stabilization.
Radius correlation does not establish causal optimizer use; per-rally linear R² ranges from 0.011 to 0.971.
No credible physics-compatible drag identification was found.
No line-specific confidence or too-close-to-call analog is exported; one endpoint-zone/structured-fault mismatch exists.
Our mapped facts remain preview/unpassed and user_facing=false; VERIFIED=0 remains binding.
No branch, commit, git add, source/config/default mutation, or best-stack change occurred.
next: Run the current stack once on the now-available source video using its frozen SHA-256/PTS identity, align all 42 CV windows and 41 insight rallies, and build a human-reviewed union event set before the audio/blur, radius, robust-fit, and recovery ablations.
